# Fixture: priscilla_shirer_shadow_noshow
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 14.9s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Priscilla! Welcome to Shiftsmart. I'm your personal concierge here to help you get started!
Partner: Hello. No one ever showed up for me to shadow. I signed in on time and left at 9:30. The store manager and assistant manager, and other employees are my witnesses to me being present and on time.

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
I'm sorry that happened. Tap the message icon in the top right corner of the app, then tap "Send us a message" and start a new chat. Let them know the store name, date, time, and that no one showed up for the shadow. You should be compensated for your time.
